connection.title: UniFi Network Advanced
connection.description: Choose how to connect to your UniFi Network controller.

data_description.connection_type: Select **Local only** for direct controller access, or **Local + Cloud** to also enable UI site management via the UniFi Cloud API.

local.title: Local Controller
local.description: Enter the connection details for your UniFi Network controller.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your UniFi controller (e.g. 192.168.1.1).
data_description.site: Site ID from the controller URL. Use `default` for the primary site.
data_description.auth_method: Choose **API key** (recommended for UniFi OS 9+) or **Username / Password** for older firmware.
data_description.api_key: Generate at your controller: **Settings > Control Plane > Integrations > Create API Key**. This is different from the cloud API key.
data_description.username: Local admin username for the controller.
data_description.password: Local admin password for the controller.
data_description.verify_ssl: Enable if the controller uses a trusted SSL certificate. Disable for self-signed certificates.

cloud.title: UniFi Cloud API
cloud.description: Optionally provide a UniFi Cloud API key for remote site management features.

data_description.cloud_api_key: API key from unifi.ui.com (Site Manager > API). Grants read-only access to cloud-connected site metadata.

site.title: Select Site
site.description: Multiple sites were discovered on this controller. Choose the site to manage.

data_description.site: Select the UniFi site you want this integration to monitor.

features.title: Features
features.description: Select which features to enable. These can be changed later in the integration options.

data_description.enable_wan_monitoring: WAN status, throughput, failover events, speedtest.
data_description.track_clients: Track network clients as device trackers.
data_description.enable_device_sensors: Creates sensors for each AP radio (channel, utilization, satisfaction) and each switch port (throughput, PoE power).
data_description.enable_dpi: Deep packet inspection traffic analysis. Polls every 5 min.
data_description.enable_protect: NVR storage, camera count, recording retention, and per-camera connectivity. Only works on gateways with Protect (UDR7, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, etc.).
data_description.enable_per_client_sensors: Creates individual sensor entities for each network client's signal strength, bandwidth, and satisfaction. On networks with many clients this can create hundreds of entities.
data_description.enable_client_controls: Enables block/unblock switches and kick/forget services for network clients.
data_description.enable_device_controls: Enables PoE port toggles, port enable/disable, WLAN switches, firewall policy switches, traffic rule switches, and port forwarding switches.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the UniFi controller. Verify the host, port, and network connectivity.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your credentials or API key.
error.invalid_api_key: The API key is invalid or has insufficient permissions.
error.no_gateway_found: No gateway device was found on this site. Ensure the controller has adopted a gateway.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This UniFi site is already configured.

init.title: Options
init.description: Configure the UniFi Network Advanced integration.

features.title: Features
features.description: Enable or disable feature categories. Changes take effect after reloading the integration.

data_description.enable_wan_monitoring: WAN status, throughput, failover events, speedtest.
data_description.track_clients: Track network clients as device trackers.
data_description.enable_device_sensors: Creates sensors for each AP radio (channel, utilization, satisfaction) and each switch port (throughput, PoE power).
data_description.enable_dpi: Deep packet inspection traffic analysis. Polls every 5 min.
data_description.enable_protect: NVR storage, camera count, recording retention, and per-camera connectivity. Only works on gateways with Protect (UDR7, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, etc.).
data_description.enable_per_client_sensors: Creates individual sensor entities for each network client's signal strength, bandwidth, and satisfaction. On networks with many clients this can create hundreds of entities.
data_description.enable_client_controls: Enables block/unblock switches and kick/forget services for network clients.
data_description.enable_device_controls: Enables PoE port toggles, port enable/disable, WLAN switches, firewall policy switches, traffic rule switches, and port forwarding switches.
data_description.enable_cloud: Cloud ISP metrics from unifi.ui.com. Polls every 15 min.

client_tracking.title: Client Tracking
client_tracking.description: Configure how network clients are tracked.

data_description.track_wired: Create device tracker entities for wired (Ethernet) clients.
data_description.track_wireless: Create device tracker entities for wireless (Wi-Fi) clients.
data_description.ssid_filter: Only track wireless clients connected to these SSIDs. Leave empty to track all.
data_description.client_heartbeat: Seconds of inactivity before a client is marked as away (default: 300).

intervals.title: Update Intervals
intervals.description: Adjust how often data is polled from the controller. Lower values increase responsiveness but add load.

data_description.update_interval_devices: How often to poll device status (default: 30).
data_description.update_interval_clients: How often to poll client data (default: 30).
data_description.update_interval_health: How often to poll system health (default: 60).
data_description.update_interval_wan_rate: How often to poll WAN transfer rates (default: 5).
data_description.update_interval_dpi: How often to poll DPI statistics (default: 300).
data_description.update_interval_cloud: How often to poll cloud API data (default: 900).
